top_signals.title: AD Ports Group Launches AI-Powered Intelligence Headquarters IHQ, Marking 20 Years of Digital Innovation
top_signals.summary: AD Ports Group (ADX: ADPORTS), a leading global enabler of trade, industry and logistics solutions, today announced the launch of its AI-driven business intelligence headquarters IHQ, a Group-wide platform employing thousands of digital workers embedding AI across 20 global workstreams. The launch of the platform is aligned with the UAE’s National Strategy for Artificial Intelligence ...

top_signals.title: Svanehoj appoints new President
top_signals.summary: Morten Christian Larsen will succeed Søren Kringelholt Nielsen as President of Svanehoj. Having held several leadership roles across the company, Larsen has built deep insight into Svanehoj’s global business in marine pumps and tank safety solutions. Svanehoj, a specialist in marine pumps and safety equipment for liquefied gases, will have a new Predient as of ...
